skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
WITH LatestQualifyingSession AS (
    SELECT
        s.session_id,
        s.session_date
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.public_sessions AS s
    JOIN
        f1_data_library_DS.public_races AS r
        ON s.race_id = r.race_id
    JOIN
        f1_data_library_DS.public_seasons AS sea
        ON r.season_id = sea.season_id
    WHERE
        s.session_type = 'Q'
        AND sea.year = 2024
    ORDER BY
        s.session_date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    pd.full_name,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(l.lap_time_ms / 60000) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(l.lap_time_ms, 60000) / 1000) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(l.lap_time_ms, 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS fastest_lap_time,
    r.race_name,
    sea.year
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.public_laps AS l
JOIN
    LatestQualifyingSession AS lqs
    ON l.session_id = lqs.session_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS pd
    ON l.driver_id = pd.driver_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_sessions AS s
    ON l.session_id = s.session_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_races AS r
    ON s.race_id = r.race_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_seasons AS sea
    ON r.season_id = sea.season_id
WHERE
    l.lap_time_ms = (
        SELECT MIN(lap_time_ms)
        FROM f1_data_library_DS.public_laps
        WHERE session_id = lqs.session_id
    )
LIMIT 1;
